mnemonics: Five by Five Square Key, Play it Fair to Keep Data Safe
keyPoints: Uses a 5x5 grid filled with a keyword (I/J share a cell)
Encrypts digraphs (pairs of letters) instead of single letters
Handles repeated letters in a pair by inserting an 'X'
commonMistakes: Forgetting to remove any duplicate letters in the keyword
Not properly handling the 'I/J' shared cell during decryption
Misapplying the row/column/rectangle rules when encrypting a digraph
